name: @aily-project/board-metro_esp32s2
description: The Adafruit Metro ESP32-S2 is a Metro-form-factor development board based on the ESP32-S2 WROVER module with 4 MB Flash, 2 MB PSRAM, native USB, Wi-Fi, LiPoly battery charging, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector.
description_en: The Adafruit Metro ESP32-S2 is a Metro-form-factor development board based on the ESP32-S2 WROVER module with 4 MB Flash, 2 MB PSRAM, native USB, Wi-Fi, LiPoly battery charging, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector.
description_zh_cn: Adafruit Metro ESP32-S2 是一款基于 ESP32-S2 WROVER 模块的 Metro 外形开发板，具有 4 MB Flash、2 MB PSRAM、原生 USB、Wi-Fi、锂电池充电、microSD 卡槽和 STEMMA QT 连接器。
author: Adafruit
